- Day 1 (Mon, Jul 20)
  - Course introduction (15 min) [PDF](/lectures/course_intro.pdf)
  - Julia basics (75 min) [HTML](/lectures/julia_basics.html)
  - In-class Assignment ([QMarkdown](/assignments/inclass-assignment/day1-assignment.qmd) / [HTML](/assignments/inclass-assignment/html/day1-assignment.html))
- Day 2 (Tue, Jul 21)
  - High performance tips (30 min)
  - Coding with AI (60 min)
- Day 3 (Thu, Jul 23)
  - Git (30 min)
  - Project management (30 min)
- Day 4 (Mon, Jul 27)
  - Data cleaning (45 min)
  - Reduced-form analysis (45 min)
- Day 5 (Tue, Jul 28)
  - Computational techniques 1 (60 min)
- Day 6 (Thu, Jul 30)
  - Computational techniques 2 (60 min)
  - Demo 1: BLP (30 min)
- Day 7 (Mon, Aug 3)
  - Numerical methods in economics 1 (60 min)
  - Demo 2: DDC (30 min)
- Day 8 (Tue, Aug 4)
  - Numerical methods in economics 2 (60 min)
  - Demo 3: TBA (30 min)
- Day 9 (Thu, Aug 6)
  - Computer cluster (45 min)
  - Demo 4: final project (45 min)
